title: Bravest Coconut
description:
It was supposed to be a simple errand: return a book to the library. But when you're an aspiring adventurer, every quest is an epic quest! Bravest Coconut is a puzzle adventure about a little white cat armed with curiosity, stubbornness, and whatever she can fit in her pockets.

Tambryn Valley is a hand-pixeled world full of places to explore and secrets to be found around every corner. Talk to the locals and poke around where you shouldn't be poking around to unravel the mysterious goings on.

Bravest Coconut is a puzzle game at heart. You'll solve inventory puzzles, dialogue puzzles, environmental brain-teasers, and plenty of surprises that don't fit neatly into any category. Some are tucked into the main story but many more are hidden off the beaten path for anyone adventurous enough to hunt them down.

The valley isn't all friendly faces. Monsters are everywhere but for a brave adventurer such as yourself, that's just a regular Tuesday. And for the less brave adventurers who just want to experience the puzzles, there's a bunch of handy accessibility options to customise your experience.

Features• A 3-5 hour main story that then unlocks a speed run mode

• A hand-pixeled world full of hidden paths, secret collectables, and surprises

• Heaps of puzzles including inventory, dialogue, environmental, and a few that defy description

• A cast of quirky characters with their own problems, opinions, and questionable advice

• Simple, fun combat

• Full accessibility options: remap input, reduce motion, adjust difficulty of combat or skip it entirely

• Playable on Windows, macOS, and Linux/Steamdeck
description_short: Bravest Coconut is a Point & Click Adventure game without pointing and clicking. Help Coco the cat as her quest to return a library book becomes much more complicated than she thought. Solve story-driven puzzles, fight monsters, and explore the beautiful valley in this retro hand-pixeled adventure.
